events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Today marks the 57th birthday of global superstar Jennifer Lopez, born in 1969.

angles.name: J.Lo's Enduring Reign
angles.copy: From Fly Girl to global icon, Jennifer Lopez turns 57 today! What's your favourite J.Lo track that still gets you moving?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born in 1943.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your top Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV first hit screens, changing music and television forever. Remember the first video they played?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, becoming a cornerstone of Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop's Big Bang
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe', an album that defined a generation. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, was held from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for Woodstock. More than just a festival, it was a cultural phenomenon. Which legendary performance do you wish you'd seen?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, we lost a legend. Elvis Presley's impact on music is immeasurable. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the influential rapper Tupac Shakur passed away on September 13, 1996, after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Legacy
angles.copy: Three decades on, Tupac Shakur's lyrics and impact continue to resonate. Remembering a true hip-hop icon today.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago, the world lost a musical pioneer. Jimi Hendrix's innovative guitar playing remains unmatched. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released in 1969
events.blurb: The iconic Beatles album 'Abbey Road' was originally released on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Walking Into History
angles.copy: This week marks 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That zebra crossing became legendary! What's your standout track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today, born in 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon Turns 75
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the formidable Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude have fronted The Pretenders for decades. What's your favourite song from her?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis, celebrates his 54th birthday today, born in 1972.

angles.name: Rock N' Roll Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Fifty-four today for the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite track featuring that iconic swagger?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released in 1975
events.blurb: John Lennon's powerful single 'Imagine' was re-released in the UK in 1975, four years after its original US debut.

angles.name: Imagine 51 Years On
angles.copy: Fifty-one years ago, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' offered a vision of peace. Its message still resonates profoundly today.

events.title: The first iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: 25 Years of iPod
angles.copy: A quarter of a century ago, the first iPod dropped, changing how we listen to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is Global James Bond Day, marking the 64th anniversary of the 'Dr. No' premiere on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens. What's your favourite Bond theme song or film?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend John Lennon, born in 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday today, born in 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend Cleese
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is undeniable. What's your favourite Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' released in 1968
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The White Album Turns 58
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, experimental masterpiece. What's your hidden gem from this iconic record?
